index.archivePiecesDescription: More than 4,000 garments and stitch developments
index.ethicalStandardDescription: A concrete commitment to responsible growth
index.howWeWork: How We Work: From Vision to Production
index.consultationDescription: Defining creative direction, yarn options, technical requirements, and product goals together with the brand.
index.prototypingDescription: Developing stitches, swatches, and prototypes with speed, precision, and continuous technical dialogue.
index.productionDescription: Managing premium small-to-medium production runs with consistent quality control and reliable execution.
index.logisticsDescription: From linking and finishing to final coordination, every step is managed with care and efficiency.
index.greaterChinaSpeedToMarketDescription: Rapid response for seasonal collections, capsule projects, and limited-edition developments.
index.greaterChinaSeamlessCommunicationDescrip: A development-oriented structure suited to brands seeking both creativity and execution.
index.greaterChinaCustomsExpertiseDescription: Established international workflow and communication standards for global partners.
index.japanTotalQualityManagementDescription: Strict attention to detail, consistency, and finishing throughout every stage of production.
index.japanArtisanalAlignmentDescription: A manufacturing culture shaped by precision, reliability, and product integrity.
index.japanLocalSupportDescription: Clear and responsive coordination to support long-term relationships with international brands.

company.heroLuxury: A knitwear partner built on expertise, archive, and responsibility
company.heroLuxuryDescription: Founded in 1977, Maglificio Pini combines Italian craftsmanship, technical knowledge, and structured manufacturing to support premium and luxury collections worldwide.
company.advancedShimaSeikiTechnology: Advanced Shima Seiki technology combined with artisanal know-how. Every garment reflects decades of technical development and fully fashioned knitwear expertise.
company.curatedCollection: A living archive of more than 4,000 garments and stitch developments, serving as both inspiration and a practical tool for product research and design evolution.
company.committedToSustainableSourcing: A concrete and measurable approach to sustainability, with ethical certification, responsible process management, and readiness to work with certified sustainable yarns upon request.
company.endToEndLifecycle: An end-to-end process for premium knitwear development and production.
company.analysisOfAestheticTrends: Continuous experimentation in stitches, techniques, fit, and yarn proposals to transform creative ideas into technically viable knitwear solutions.
company.rapidPrototyping: Fast and accurate prototype development with attention to proportion, construction, and product identity.
company.scaleableManufacturing: Premium small-to-medium production runs with consistency, precision, and rigorous quality control throughout every phase.
company.specializedLogisticsAndProductionStrateg: A structured development and production model designed to support international brands with clarity, flexibility, and technical depth.
company.chinaFocusDescription: Ideal for brands that require fast development cycles, capsule collections, and technically agile execution without compromising Italian quality.
company.japanFocusDescription: Suited to brands that value product integrity, finishing quality, and disciplined manufacturing standards across every stage of development and production.
company.readyToStartYourNextLuxuryCollection: Ready to start your next knitwear collection?
company.ourTeamIsReadyToDiscussYourSpecificProdu: Our team is ready to discuss your development needs, production volumes, and technical requirements.

contacts.ourExpertsAreReadyToTranslateYourVisionI: Our team is ready to translate your vision into refined Italian knitwear. Reach out to discuss your next collection.

hero.title: Technology and Craftsmanship in Knitwear Development
hero.description: Where Italian manufacturing heritage meets advanced knitwear technology for premium and luxury brands. We connect creative vision with technical execution.
hero.ourServicesDescription: An end-to-end process for knitwear development, from yarn selection and stitch research to production and finishing.
hero.creativeResearchDescription: Study of yarns, stitches, structures, and fit to define products that are both creative and technically coherent.
hero.precisionSamplingDescription: Turning complex ideas into accurate prototypes with close attention to gauge, construction, and finishing.
hero.scaleProductionDescription: Reliable production of fully fashioned knitwear supported by structured workflow, quality control, and manufacturing consistency.
hero.technicalInfrastructureDescription: A fully integrated facility equipped to support multiple gauges, complex constructions, and refined product development.
hero.shimaSeikiTechnologyDescription: Advanced electronic flat knitting technology supporting heavy, mid-weight, and fine gauge developments with high precision.
hero.creativeFreedomDescription: Our machinery and technical expertise allow us to translate diverse textures, constructions, and silhouettes into manufacturable knitwear.
hero.partnerWithExcellenceDescription: We welcome premium and luxury brands to explore our facility in Forlì or arrange a direct introduction to our technical capabilities.
